prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical fashion-editorial magazine poster for a rebellious streetwear brand identity centered on HER19845.

Canvas: Portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, clean off-white studio background with subtle paper grain and tiny registration-cross marks in all four corners.

Layout: Place one full-body female model in the center foreground, standing confidently with legs apart and hands in pockets. Behind her, fill almost the entire background with enormous condensed block typography reading HER19845, cropped at the edges, using a gritty orange-to-pink-to-purple gradient with distressed texture. Add an energetic orange handwritten signature/scribble overlay across the right-middle area, partially crossing the model and the large number forms.

Subject details: The model has long highlighted brown-blonde hair and a deliberately anonymized blurred face. She wears a white cropped ribbed tank top, layered necklaces, an oversized black zip hoodie with white lining and colorful paint-splatter graphics, very loose black drawstring streetwear pants with orange, pink, and purple graffiti marks, and chunky black-white-orange sneakers. Pose is relaxed, confident, rebellious, fashion campaign style.

Visible text content: Include exactly 9 distinct text elements: 1) giant background headline: “HER19845”; 2) left bold tagline: “REBEL. UNFILTERED. ICON IN PROGRESS.”; 3) left paragraph: “Built on raw energy and real ambition. This is not for everyone. This is for HER.”; 4) lower-left issue line: “VOL. 08 / MMXXV”; 5) lower-left pink slogan stacked in three lines: “THE CULTURE / THE VISION / THE FUTURE”; 6) right bracketed label: “[HER19845]”; 7) small pink right slogan: “NOT YOURS. NEVER WAS.”; 8) bottom-left black-and-white label: “PARENTAL ADVISORY EXPLICIT CONTENT”; 9) orange handwritten mark reading After19845. Also include two tiny graphic icons under the right slogan: a simple globe icon and a small barcode.

Visual style: High-contrast studio fashion photography blended with bold graphic poster design, sharp full-body lighting, slight floor shadow, grunge print texture, contemporary youth-culture zine aesthetic, neon gradient typography, orange marker strokes, black/pink accent typography.

Constraints: Keep the model centered over the huge background word, maintain legible poster text, use no extra words beyond the 9 listed text elements, preserve the blurred/anonymized face, and make the final result look like a premium rebellious streetwear magazine cover.
